subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant nigh unto God! Thy letter hath been received. Right is on thy side. For some time now, the esteemed Fazel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المقربه نامه شما رسید حق بجانب شماست حضرت فاضل مدتی است که از شما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @growth of the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @poems and quotation from poetry
